mapper.insert: INSERT INTO packing_lists ( pl_id, po_id, pl_invoice_date, client_id, pl_gross_weight, pl_status, pl_client_name, pl_client_address, pl_country, pl_payment_terms, pl_port_of_discharge, pl_buyer, pl_items_snapshot, pl_linked_documents ) SELECT #{plId}, po_id, CURRENT_DATE, client_id, NULL, '발행대기', po_client_name, po_client_address, po_country, po_incoterms_code, po_named_place, po_manager_name, po_items_snapshot, CONCAT('[{"id":"', po_id, '","type":"PO","status":"', po_status, '"}]') FROM purchase_orders WHERE po_id = #{poId}
